---
title: "06.0- methylKit - Data Import and QC"
---

# Load packages & data
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(methylKit)
library(pheatmap)
library(rcolorbrewer)
library(tidyverse)

# Load metadata
meta <- read.csv("file path")

```

# Load methylation files & define paths
```{bash}

# File paths
# add metadata here instead of with the libraries
# paths to methylation files on Raven

```

```{r}

# Import methylation data
myobj <- methRead(
  location = file.list,
  sample.id = meta$sample_id,
  assembly = "Mytilus_trossulus",
  treatment = meta$treatment,
  context = "CpG"
)

```

# QC plots
```{r}

getCoverageStats(myobj[[1]], plot=TRUE)
getMethylationStats(myobj[[1]], plot=TRUE)

```

# Filter coverage & save
```{r}

myobj_filtered <- filterByCoverage(
  myobj,
  lo.count = 5,
  hi.perc = 99.9)

save(myobj_filtered,
     file = "output/methylkit/objects/methylkit_filtered.RData")

```
